---
title: "Home"
---

# Welcome

This site collects practical notes and reusable guides for teaching and working with data visualization workflows.

The pages are organized as short, independent references that can be used separately depending on the task, tool, or course context.

## Available sections

### Environment

This section includes practical setup notes for working with Python environments in VS Code.

Current page:

- [Python `.venv`](environment/venv-vscode.qmd)

### Git and Publishing

This section focuses on Git, Quarto, and publishing workflows.

Current pages:

- [Install Quarto](git-github/quarto-install.qmd)
- [Quarto Project](git-github/quarto-project.qmd)
- [Git Basics](git-github/git-intro.qmd)
- [GitHub Pages](git-github/github-pages.qmd)

## How to use this site

You can navigate through the sections using the top menu.

Each page is intended to be:

- short and practical
- focused on one workflow or setup task
- easy to reuse in teaching and project work

## Recommended starting points

If you are new to this documentation, a good order is:

1. [Python `.venv`](environment/venv-vscode.qmd)
2. [Install Quarto](git-github/quarto-install.qmd)
3. [Quarto Project](git-github/quarto-project.qmd)
4. [Git Basics](git-github/git-intro.qmd)
5. [GitHub Pages](git-github/github-pages.qmd)

## Notes

This is a living documentation space. New sections and guides may be added over time as new teaching, setup, and publishing workflows are incorporated.
